about.title: About Us
about.p1: In today's world, businesses thrive on connections that cross oceans and continents. At CP Freight Forwarders LLP, we are more than a logistics company—we are a global trade enabler. For decades, we've been trusted by exporters, importers, manufacturers, distributors, and corporates to simplify international shipping and ensure their cargo reaches destinations with efficiency, compliance, and care.
about.p2: With an integrated suite of services—ocean freight, air freight, customs clearance, road and rail transport, project logistics, and supply chain solutions—we deliver end-to-end freight forwarding that combines speed, cost-efficiency, and transparency.
about.p3: At CP Freight Forwarders LLP, every consignment matters—because we don't just move cargo, we move businesses forward.

services.title: Our Services
service.ocean.title: Ocean Freight
service.ocean.desc: Flexible and cost-effective sea freight solutions across all major global trade lanes.
service.air.title: Air Freight
service.air.desc: Time-sensitive and high-value shipment solutions with speed and security.
service.customs.title: Customs Clearance
service.customs.desc: Expert customs brokerage to simplify documentation and ensure compliance.
service.road.title: Road & Rail Transport
service.road.desc: Reliable domestic distribution through road and rail networks.
service.project.title: Project Cargo & Special Logistics
service.project.desc: End-to-end planning and execution for oversized and complex cargo.
service.supply.title: Supply Chain Solutions
service.supply.desc: Warehousing, inventory management, and distribution solutions.
achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.badge: Recognized for excellence in timely delivery and compliance management
why.title: Why Us ?
why.sub: At CP Freight Forwarders LLP, we position ourselves as a strategic partner in your business journey.
why.item1.title: End-to-End Logistics Under One Roof
why.item1.desc: From international freight forwarding to customs clearance, warehousing, last-mile delivery, and supply chain solutions.
why.item2.title: Global Network, Local Strength
why.item2.desc: Strategic tie-ups with shipping lines, airlines, and logistics partners worldwide.
why.item3.title: Trusted by Diverse Industries
why.item3.desc: Serving exporters, importers, SMEs, and multinationals across multiple sectors.
why.item4.title: Technology-Enabled Efficiency
why.item4.desc: Digital platforms for real-time tracking and transparent communication.
group.title: Our Group Companies / Integrated Ecosystem
group.p: Together, these entities form a powerful logistics ecosystem that ensures end-to-end solutions.
footer.brand.p: Welcome to C P Forwarders, where innovation meets our passion in a journey that started as a dream.
